title: pigea cymulosa
intro: Pigea cymulosa, also known as the Himalayan Marsh Cinquefoil, is a perennial herb plant that belongs to the family Potentilla. It is native to the Himalayan region and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Pigea cymulosa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat various skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Pigea cymulosa can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat a range of ailments.
